title: Softmax & Temperature
tagline: How temperature reshapes a probability distribution — and samples from it
summary: Edit logits live and watch softmax turn them into probabilities. Slide the temperature knob from 0.05 to 5 and see a peaky distribution morph into a uniform one. Draw one sample at a time or 10,000 at once — the same dial that powers ChatGPT creativity, knowledge distillation, and calibration.
highlights: Start with editable logits and see softmax preserve ordering while exponentiating differences.
Drag the temperature slider and watch the distribution morph from argmax to uniform with live entropy readout.
Draw individual samples and see the random draw u land on a cumulative bar — the exact mechanism LLMs use to pick the next token.
Run 10,000 samples and watch the empirical histogram converge onto the true softmax probabilities (Monte Carlo convergence live).
Five real-world settings where temperature shows up: LLM generation, distillation, diffusion guidance, RL exploration, and calibration.
